nodes.name: Query raw_market_data
nodes.query: SELECT * FROM raw_market_data WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

nodes.name: Calculate Absolute Score
Insert to absolute_scores
nodes.query: INSERT INTO absolute_scores (nq200ma_score, nq50ma_score, nq20ema50ema_score, mtf_score, market_phase_score, final_absolute_score, trend_direction, timestamp) VALUES (${msg.payload.nq200ma_score}, ${msg.payload.nq50ma_score}, ${msg.payload.nq20ema50ema_score}, ${msg.payload.mtf_score}, ${msg.payload.market_phase_score}, ${msg.payload.final_absolute_score}, '${msg.payload.trend_direction}', '${msg.payload.timestamp}')

metadata.description: Flow 7: Absolute Score Calculation - calculates weighted absolute score from market data
